Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. TruffleRuby 188 upvotes, 25 comments
  2. Randomness on Apple Platforms (2024) 25 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. CERN levels up with new superconducting karts 335 upvotes, 77 comments
  4. A new way to measure poverty shows the US falling behind Europe 40 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. Chess in SQL 153 upvotes, 35 comments
  6. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 486 upvotes, 144 comments
  7. NASA Artemis II moon mission live launch broadcast 70 upvotes, 15 comments
  8. Ada and Spark on ARM Cortex-M – A Tutorial with Arduino and Nucleo Examples 29 upvotes, 4 comments
  9. Claude Code Unpacked : A visual guide 922 upvotes, 337 comments
  10. Intuiting Pratt Parsing 118 upvotes, 34 comments
  11. Is BGP safe yet? 187 upvotes, 60 comments
  12. Show HN: 1-Bit Bonsai, the First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs 367 upvotes, 140 comments
  13. StepFun 3.5 Flash is #1 cost-effective model for OpenClaw tasks (300 battles) 60 upvotes, 20 comments
  14. Show HN: CLI to order groceries via reverse-engineered REWE API (Haskell) 172 upvotes, 72 comments
  15. Claude Wrote a Full FreeBSD Remote Kernel RCE with Root Shell (CVE-2026-4747) 191 upvotes, 82 comments
  16. Playing Wolfenstein 3D with one hand in 2026 17 upvotes, 3 comments
  17. Show HN: Real-time dashboard for Claude Code agent teams 35 upvotes, 10 comments
  18. Consider the Greenland Shark (2020) 63 upvotes, 24 comments
  19. The Document Foundation ejects its core developers 54 upvotes, 20 comments
  20. EmDash – a spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security 180 upvotes, 98 comments
  21. What Is Copilot Exactly? 36 upvotes, 14 comments
  22. The OpenAI Graveyard: All the Deals and Products That Haven't Happened 91 upvotes, 57 comments
  23. Show HN: Sycamore – next gen Rust web UI library using fine-grained reactivity 83 upvotes, 54 comments
  24. AI for American-Produced Cement and Concrete 29 upvotes, 16 comments
  25. Show HN: Zerobox – Sandbox any command with file and network restrictions 13 upvotes, 5 comments
  26. AI companies charge you 60% more based on your language, BPE tokens 20 upvotes, 10 comments
  27. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (April 2026) 82 upvotes, 70 comments
  28. New patches allow building Linux IPv6-only 95 upvotes, 102 comments
  29. Random numbers, Persian code: A mysterious signal transfixes radio sleuths 64 upvotes, 66 comments
  30. Wasmer (YC S19) Is Hiring – Rust and DevRel Positions 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 2:00am, 2 April 2026. Source here.
